GREEN.effect: $2 per remaining Hand, $1 per remaining Discard, no interest

MAGIC.effect: Start with Crystal Ball voucher and 2 copies of The Fool

NEBULA.effect: Start with Telescope voucher, -1 consumable slot

GHOST.effect: Spectral cards may appear in shop, start with Hex card

ABANDONED.effect: Start with no Face Cards in deck

CHECKERED.effect: Start with 26 Spades and 26 Hearts in deck

ZODIAC.effect: Start with Tarot Merchant, Planet Merchant, and Overstock

ANAGLYPH.effect: Gain Double Tag after each Boss Blind

PLASMA.effect: Balance Chips and Mult when calculating score; 2X base Blind size

ERRATIC.effect: All Ranks and Suits in deck are randomized
